stemHtml: Which of the following statements accurately defines the concept of material fatigue as it applies to aircraft structures and engineering materials?

options.a: If a material is continually loaded and unloaded, it will eventually break even though the load remains the same.
options.b: A one-off loading that breaks the material.
options.c: A loading on the material, but it returns fully to its former state when the load is removed.
options.d: The material suffers progressively more permanent damage each time that it is loaded and unloaded.
